ghInfo.author: github-actions[bot]
ghInfo.bodyExcerpt:
## Automated Weekly Fingerprint Sync

This PR was auto-generated by the weekly fingerprint sync workflow.

### What changed
- Fetched latest fingerprints from Z2M (tuya, sonoff, danfoss, schneider, legrand, bosch, ikea, xiaomi)
- Auto-added safe Tuya _T* manufacturer patterns to appropriate drivers
- All JSON validated

### Reports
See data/community-sync/sync-report.md for full details.
See data/community-sync/missing-fingerprints.json for non-Tuya items needing manual review.
